mech-suspension.name: Mechanical Suspension Seat — Heavy Duty
mech-suspension.description: High-comfort universal mechanical suspension driver's seat designed for agricultural tractors and Light Commercial Vehicles (LCVs). Featuring premium contoured polyurethane foam, adjustable mechanical spring suspension, and a heavy-duty sliding rail. Protects the driver from spinal fatigue and road shocks. Perfect fit for Mahindra, Eicher, Massey Ferguson, Swaraj, and John Deere tractors.
mech-suspension.compatText: Fits: Eicher 380, 485, 242 · Mahindra 475, 575 DI · John Deere · Massey Ferguson · Tata Ace Gold · Bolero Pickup

silencer-short.name: Short Silencer — Heavy Duty Agri Grade
silencer-short.description: Heavy-duty short-body agricultural exhaust silencer. Precision manufactured with high-gauge carbon steel for superior heat dissipation. Offers original tractor exhaust rhythm with minimized backpressure.
silencer-short.compatText: Fits: Massey Ferguson 1035 · Swaraj 735 DI · Mahindra 275 DI DI

silencer-long.name: Long Silencer — Premium Chrome Guard
silencer-long.description: Premium long-body tractor silencer equipped with a chrome-plated outer heat shield. Double-insulated core ensures quiet operation and long structural life. Highly recommended for commercial tractor operations.
silencer-long.compatText: Fits: Swaraj 744 FE · Mahindra 575 DI · Eicher 380 · Sonalika DI 750

silencer-netted.name: Matte Black Netted Silencer — Heat Shield
silencer-netted.description: Modern matte-black exhaust silencer wrapped in an outer protective steel wire mesh. The netted mesh prevents direct accidental skin contact with the hot silencer body, making it ideal for agricultural workers.
silencer-netted.compatText: Fits: John Deere 5050D · Swaraj 855 FE · New Holland 3630

specs.Material: Gauge 16 Steel with Protective Wire Mesh

silencer-wide.name: Wide Body Silencer — Maximum Baffle
silencer-wide.description: Extra-wide chamber agricultural exhaust silencer. Built with a high-capacity internal multi-baffle system that minimizes tractor engine noise while maintaining high airflow and combustion efficiency.
silencer-wide.compatText: Fits: Sonalika Rx 750 · John Deere 5310 · Farmtrac 60 Powermaxx

silencer-oval.name: Oval Silencer — Matte Black Finish
silencer-oval.description: Matte black premium exhaust silencer designed for modern tractors and utility trucks. Built using high-gauge aluminized steel with high-temperature resistance coating. Engineered for exact backpressure match and noise-reduction specs.
silencer-oval.compatText: Fits: John Deere 5045D, 5050D · Mahindra 575 DI · Eicher 333

long-haul.name: Long-Haul Cabin Seat — Foam Core
long-haul.description: Premium static cabin driver's seat featuring a high-density 60mm contoured foam core. Designed for heavy commercial vehicles and long-haul operations. Features premium breathable leatherette cover, integrated lumbar support, and adjustable slide rails for maximum ergonomic comfort.
long-haul.compatText: Fits: Tata 407, 608, 709 · Ashok Leyland Dost · Eicher Pro

specs.Base Type: Static Rigid Base on Slider Rails

truck-cabin.name: Long-Haul Cabin Seat — Foam Core
truck-cabin.description: Premium static cabin driver's seat featuring a high-density 60mm contoured foam core. Designed for heavy commercial vehicles and long-haul operations. Features premium breathable leatherette cover, integrated lumbar support, and adjustable slide rails for maximum ergonomic comfort.
truck-cabin.compatText: Fits: Tata 407, 608, 709 · Ashok Leyland Dost · Eicher Pro

specs.Base Type: Static Rigid Base on Slider Rails

air-ride.name: Air-Ride Suspension Cabin Seat
air-ride.description: Top-of-the-line pneumatic air-ride suspension driver's seat for Heavy Commercial Vehicles (HCVs). Features dynamic weight-adjusting air suspension, dual armrests, adjustable integrated headrest, and comprehensive lumbar adjustment. The ultimate seat for premium fleet operations.
air-ride.compatText: Fits: Tata Prima · Leyland Boss · Eicher Pro 3015

mini-flat.name: Mini Truck Flat Seat — Standard
mini-flat.description: Affordable, heavy-duty replacement driver's seat for mini-trucks. Standard 40mm density foam core on a flat base. Simple, durable construction designed to fit small cabins and withstand rough daily wear.
mini-flat.compatText: Fits: Tata Ace, Ace Gold · Mahindra Jeeto · Maruti Super Carry

specs.Backrest: Low-back flat design for tight cabin space

van-bench.name: Passenger Van Bench Seat — 3-Seater
van-bench.description: 3-passenger bench seat for commercial transport vans and travellers. Includes fold-flat capability, premium water-resistant leatherette covers, and high-back seating with integrated headrests. Ideal for passenger fleets.
van-bench.compatText: Fits: Force Traveller · Tempo 407 Van · Tata Winger

specs.Base Type: Rigid Bench Frame with Folding Hinge

co-driver.name: High-Back Co-Driver Seat — Folding
co-driver.description: Comfortable, space-saving co-driver cabin seat with folding backrest. Designed for heavy commercial vehicles to allow easy passage inside the cabin. High-back profile provides excellent neck and head support.
co-driver.compatText: Fits: Tata LPT 1613, 2518 · Leyland 2518 · Eicher Pro

specs.Base Type: Fixed Mounting Frame with Folding Backrest Hinge
specs.Backrest: High-back with integrated headrest, folds flat
